holdings.infoBox: DES is an equity ETF with a total of 523 individual holdings. The top holdings are TFS Financial stock at 1.15%, Kodiak Gas Services at 1.08%, EPR Properties at 1.08%, Sonoco Products Company at 0.91%, and Cal-Maine Foods at 0.90%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree U.S. SmallCap Dividend Fund (DES) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the WisdomTree U.S. Small Cap Dividend index. The fund tracks an index of dividend-paying US stocks. The dividend-weighted index is a small-cap subset of the WisdomTree Dividend Index. DES was launched on Jun 16, 2006 and is issued by WisdomTree.
